title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Rhenus Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Rhenus Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
